title: Bordlite 34" XXL 3-Wheel Holdall – Extra Large Rolling Travel Bag with Extendable Handle, Durable Heavy-Duty Duffel Luggage for Long Trips, Sports, Road or Camping Adventures – Black
features: 𝗠𝗔𝗫𝗜𝗠𝗨𝗠 𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗔𝗚𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗟𝗢𝗡𝗚 𝗧𝗥𝗜𝗣𝗦: Oversized 34" design provides exceptional packing space for family holidays, sports gear, or extended adventures.
𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝟯-𝗪𝗛𝗘𝗘𝗟 𝗦𝗬𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗠: Triple-wheel base delivers smoother rolling and greater stability across all surfaces.
𝗔𝗗𝗝𝗨𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗘𝗫𝗧𝗘𝗡𝗗𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗟𝗘: Comfortable to pull and easy to steer through airports, hotels, or campsites.
𝗛𝗘𝗔𝗩𝗬-𝗗𝗨𝗧𝗬 𝗔𝗡𝗗 𝗥𝗘𝗟𝗜𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘: Reinforced base, strong seams, and tough zips ensure long-lasting durability.
𝗗𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦, 𝗖𝗔𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗜𝗧𝗬 & 𝗪𝗘𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧: 84 x 42 x 43cm | Capacity: 156L | Weight: 2.3kg
description: Go further with the Bordlite 34" XXL Holdall — designed for long trips, family holidays, and heavy loads. Its 3-wheel base, extendable handle, and huge 156L capacity offer smooth, stable travel in a tough yet lightweight 2.3kg build.
